meaning: n.强求者,勒索者,[律]勒索钱财
examples: Both are suspected of making payments of millions of yen to a so-called "sokaiya" corporate extortionist, Terubo Tei, since 1995.
That was the name used on ransom demands made by an extortionist who in 1984 poisoned the sweets made by two Japanese confectionery firms.
